question: What is the primary function of a Zylosian Geo-Resonator?

answers.ground_truth: The primary function of a Zylosian Geo-Resonator is to stabilize volatile Chronium deposits using a harmonic wave.
answers.original: The primary function of a Zylosian Geo-Resonator is to emit a harmonic wave that stabilizes volatile Chronium deposits during mining.
answers.perturbed: The Zylosian Geo-Resonator model XR-7A requires a standard Z-type power cell to operate.

ops.description: The water from the Font of Resonance resonates with psionic energy, amplifying mental abilities.<SEP>The water from the Font of Resonance resonates with psionic energy, amplifying mental abilities.

entities.name: Zylosian Geo-Resonator
entities.description: A Zylosian Geo-Resonator is a device used to emit a harmonic wave that stabilizes volatile Chronium deposits during mining.

entities.name: Chronium Deposits
entities.description: Chronium deposits are highly reactive resources found in the deep crust of planet Zylos.

entities.name: Zylosian Geo-Resonator Model XR-7A
entities.description: The Zylosian Geo-Resonator model XR-7A is a specific version of the Geo-Resonator that requires a standard Z-type power cell to operate.

entities.name: Z-Type Power Cell
entities.description: A Z-type power cell is the power source required for the operation of the Zylosian Geo-Resonator model XR-7A.

relations.description: The Zylosian Geo-Resonator emits a harmonic wave to stabilize volatile Chronium deposits during mining.
The Zylosian Geo-Resonator model XR-7A requires a standard Z-type power cell to operate.
Safety protocols mandate that all personnel wear radiation-shielded gear near a Geo-Resonator.

entities.name: Chef Zorgon
entities.description: Chef Zorgon is a famous user of Phlorian Salt, known for their work at the Celestial Cafe.
